name: Georgia Peach Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sugar, flour, cornstarch, and salt.
2. Gradually add milk to the dry ingredients while stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Cook over boiling water, stirring continuously, until the mixture begins to thicken.
4. Remove from heat and gradually mix in the well-beaten egg yolks and butter, stirring until combined.
5. Add lemon juice and let the mixture cool slightly.
6. Arrange 1 cup of sliced peaches in the bottom of the pie shell.
7. Pour the prepared filling over the peaches.
8. Place the remaining peaches on top of the filling.
9. Chill thoroughly before serving.
10. Top with sweetened whipped cream.
